code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut acc = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        mut val = acc
        if neg
          val = 0 - val
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, val)
        has = false
        neg = false
        acc = 0
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
      has = true
    else if b == 43 and not has
      has = true
    else
      acc = acc * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    mut val = acc
    if neg
      val = 0 - val
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, val)
  end
  let len = nums.len()
  mut maxes: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut j = 0
  while j < len
    let x = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      cur = x
    else if x > cur
      cur = x
    end
    maxes = list.push(maxes, cur)
    j = j + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < len
    let x = match maxes.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{x}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
